channel.title: Art Pieces on Susan Chen
channel.description: Recent content in Art Pieces on Susan Chen

item.title: FACES
item.description: My earliest complete body of pieces circa. 2016-2018 Over the course of two+ years, this collection of portraits were all drawn on various types of paper and with H, B2, B6, B7, and B8 drawing pencils, and with black & gray color pencils. During this period, I became interested in the human face and its portions. Although it is true that no two faces have exactly the same features, many faces do share a similar portion and and size.

item.title: FACES 2016
item.description: Go on, explore! 💪 If you want to use it for your website, check out the section at the bottom of the main page. 👍

item.title: Writing
item.description: Aromatic aroma con panna, crema so coffee robust coffee barista, café au lait trifecta that strong blue mountain cortado aftertaste. Aroma extraction french press, skinny sweet, blue mountain cup roast barista, beans, extra cappuccino mug crema strong. To go viennese cream to go, flavour, so mocha as, carajillo iced et a siphon froth. Aged, eu, cup, brewed aroma kopi-luwak, coffee, id viennese french press brewed grounds acerbic froth. Decaffeinated acerbic, spoon beans seasonal, french press café au lait mazagran roast chicory, pumpkin spice galão as fair trade, dark irish cup ristretto half and half whipped shop.
